title: Croatian Apple Bake
description: A sweet and velvety Croatian dessert featuring ground clove and baked to perfection in a wood-fired oven, this dish is a nostalgic treat for the senses. It is onion and garlic free, making it suitable for all tastes.

ingredients.name: apples
ingredients.notes: Granny Smith or other sweet variety

instructions: Preheat the wood-fired oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Peel and slice the apples into thin wedges.
In a large bowl, mix together the sugar, flour, ground clove, and ground cinnamon.
Add the sliced apples to the bowl and toss until they are evenly coated with the sugar mixture.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the melted butter, eggs, and milk.
Add the wet ingredients to the apple mixture and stir until just combined.
Pour the mixture into a 9x9 inch baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake the apple mixture in the preheated oven for 40-45 minutes, or until it is golden brown and set.
Remove the bake from the oven and let it cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
